lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Yeah, I’m here. Did you feel that too boss?

lines.speaker: Captain Dwyer
lines.text: Course I did! That’s why I’m calling you!

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Lemme guess: Mob got mad at the Casino again for not paying their dues?

lines.speaker: Captain Dwyer
lines.text: No, much worse. I’m getting reports of catastrophic failures all across the city. This is big, Macklin.

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: ...Catastrophic failures? What does that even mean?

lines.speaker: Captain Dwyer
lines.text: I don’t know another way to explain this to you Mackin! CITY. WIDE. CATASTROPHIC. FAILURES.

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Alright, alright, calm down Cap. What do you need me to do?

lines.speaker: Captain Dwyer
lines.text: I need you to get to the main control center, figure out what’s going on.

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Can’t you just radio in there and ask?

lines.speaker: Captain Dwyer
lines.text: No one is responding, Macklin! That’s why I’m calling you!

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Alright, fine, I’ll go check it out. Seems like I can never get a good night’s sleep in this city.

lines.speaker: Captain Dwyer
lines.text: Call me with a status report ASAP!
